daily.today_energy: Your inner light is hitting different today, Leo. The cosmos is giving you permission to take up space and shine unapologetically. Trust the magnetism that naturally flows through you—people are drawn to your authenticity right now.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, your heart's frequency is elevated. If you've been holding back on expressing something real, today's energy supports vulnerability. Real connection thrives when you lead with genuine emotion, not the performance.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is sharp today. You don't need permission to lead or suggest that new idea—your instincts are aligned with what actually works. Channel that confident energy into action rather than overthinking.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to move in ways that feel good, not obligatory. Whether that's stretching, dancing, or walking in sunlight, prioritize what energizes you. Your nervous system appreciates when you honor what feels nourishing over what feels like duty.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to lean into your authenticity, Leo. You're radiating a magnetic frequency that draws the right people closer. Trust the momentum building around you—something real is shifting.
weekly.love: Your vibe is irresistible rn, but the universe is asking you to be intentional about who gets access. Quality over quantity applies to connections too. If you're coupled up, vulnerability hits different this week.
weekly.career: Mercury's supporting your communication game hard. This is your moment to pitch ideas, have those convos you've been postponing, or just let your creative energy flow naturally. Your voice matters more than you think.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dance, stretch, walk in nature—anything that reconnects you with feeling alive. Energy levels are steady; honor what your system actually needs.
